attribution.title: The Lucas and Babbage congruences

license.label: cc0 — full Lean file available under commission

nodes.label: binomZ
nodes.lean:
noncomputable def binomZ (m : ℤ) (n : ℤ) : ℤ :=
  if 0 ≤ n then Ring.choose m n.toNat else 0

nodes.label: thm_prop_binom_00
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_prop_binom_00 : ∀ (m : ℚ), Ring.choose m 0 = 1 := by
  exact Ring.choose_zero_right

nodes.label: thm_prop_vandermonde_consequences
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_prop_vandermonde_consequences : ∀ (x y : ℤ) (n : ℕ), Ring.choose (x + y) n = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), Ring.choose x i * Ring.choose y (n - i) := by
  intro x y n; rw [Ring.add_choose_eq n (Commute.all x y), Finset.Nat.sum_antidiagonal_eq_sum_range_succ_mk]

nodes.label: thm_prop_binom_p
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_prop_binom_p : ∀ (p k : ℕ), p.Prime → 1 ≤ k → k < p → p ∣ Nat.choose p k := by
  intro p k hp hk1 hkp; exact hp.dvd_choose_self (by omega) hkp

nodes.label: thm_cor_vandermonde_1
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_cor_vandermonde_1 : ∀ (x : ℤ) (y : ℕ) (n : ℤ), binomZ (x + (y : ℤ)) n = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (y + 1), binomZ x (n - (i : ℤ)) * binomZ (y : ℤ) (i : ℤ) := by
  intro x y n; by_cases hn : 0 ≤ n <;> first | (lift n to ℕ using hn with m; have hy0 : ∀ i : ℕ, y < i → binomZ (y : ℤ) (i : ℤ) = 0 := fun i hyi => (by simp [binomZ, Ring.choose_natCast, Nat.choose_eq_zero_of_lt hyi]); have hx0 : ∀ i : ℕ, m < i → binomZ x ((m : ℤ) - (i : ℤ)) = 0 := fun i hmi => (by simp only [binomZ, if_neg (show ¬ (0:ℤ) ≤ (m:ℤ) - (i:ℤ) by omega)]); have hmain : binomZ (x + (y : ℤ)) (m : ℤ) = Ring.choose (x + (y : ℤ)) m := (by simp [binomZ]); have hA : (∑ i ∈ Finset.range (m + 1), Ring.choose x i * Ring.choose (y : ℤ) (m - i)) = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (m + 1), binomZ x ((m : ℤ) - ((m + 1 - 1 - i : ℕ) : ℤ)) * binomZ (y : ℤ) ((m + 1 - 1 - i : ℕ) : ℤ) := (by refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun i hi => ?_; rw [show ((m : ℤ) - ((m + 1 - 1 - i : ℕ) : ℤ)) = (i : ℤ) by (have h := Finset.mem_range.mp hi; omega)]; simp [binomZ]); rw [hmain, thm_prop_vandermonde_consequences x (y : ℤ) m, hA, Finset.sum_range_reflect (fun j => binomZ x ((m : ℤ) - (j : ℤ)) * binomZ (y : ℤ) (j : ℤ)) (m + 1)]; have hB1 : (∑ i ∈ Finset.range (m + 1), binomZ x ((m : ℤ) - (i : ℤ)) * binomZ (y : ℤ) (i : ℤ)) = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (m + y + 1), binomZ x ((m : ℤ) - (i : ℤ)) * binomZ (y : ℤ) (i : ℤ) := (by refine Finset.sum_subset (by intro a ha; simp only [Finset.mem_range] at ha ⊢; omega) fun i _ hni => ?_; rw [hx0 i (by simp only [Finset.mem_range, not_lt] at hni; omega), zero_mul]); have hB2 : (∑ i ∈ Finset.range (y + 1), binomZ x ((m : ℤ) - (i : ℤ)) * binomZ (y : ℤ) (i : ℤ)) = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (m + y + 1), binomZ x ((m : ℤ) - (i : ℤ)) * binomZ (y : ℤ) (i : ℤ) := (by refine Finset.sum_subset (by intro a ha; simp only [Finset.mem_range] at ha ⊢; omega) fun i _ hni => ?_; rw [hy0 i (by simp only [Finset.mem_range, not_lt] at hni; omega), mul_zero]); exact hB1.trans hB2.symm) | (have h0 : ∀ i ∈ Finset.range (y + 1), binomZ x (n - (i : ℤ)) * binomZ (y : ℤ) (i : ℤ) = 0 := fun i _ => (by rw [show binomZ x (n - (i : ℤ)) = 0 by simp only [binomZ, if_neg (show ¬ (0:ℤ) ≤ n - (i:ℤ) by omega)], zero_mul]); rw [Finset.sum_eq_zero h0]; simp only [binomZ, if_neg hn])

nodes.label: thm_cor_vandermonde_2
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_cor_vandermonde_2 : ∀ (x : ℤ) (y : ℕ) (n : ℤ), 1 ≤ y → binomZ (x + (y : ℤ)) n = binomZ x n + (∑ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (y - 1), binomZ x (n - (i : ℤ)) * binomZ (y : ℤ) (i : ℤ)) + binomZ x (n - (y : ℤ)) := by
  intro x y n hy; rw [thm_cor_vandermonde_1 x y n, show Finset.range (y + 1) = insert 0 (insert y (Finset.Icc 1 (y - 1))) by (ext a; simp only [Finset.mem_range, Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_Icc]; omega), Finset.sum_insert (by simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_Icc]; omega), Finset.sum_insert (by simp only [Finset.mem_Icc]; omega)]; rw [show binomZ (y : ℤ) ((0 : ℕ) : ℤ) = 1 by simp [binomZ, Ring.choose_zero_right], show binomZ (y : ℤ) ((y : ℕ) : ℤ) = 1 by simp [binomZ, Ring.choose_natCast]]; simp only [Nat.cast_zero, sub_zero, mul_one]; ring

nodes.label: thm_cor_vandermonde_p
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_cor_vandermonde_p : ∀ (x n : ℤ) (p : ℕ), p.Prime → binomZ (x + (p : ℤ)) n ≡ binomZ x n + binomZ x (n - (p : ℤ)) [ZMOD (p : ℤ)] := by
  intro x n p hp; rw [thm_cor_vandermonde_2 x p n hp.pos]; have hS : (p : ℤ) ∣ ∑ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (p - 1), binomZ x (n - (i : ℤ)) * binomZ (p : ℤ) (i : ℤ) := (by refine Finset.dvd_sum fun i hi => ?_; have hmem := Finset.mem_Icc.mp hi; have h1 : binomZ (p : ℤ) (i : ℤ) = ((p.choose i : ℕ) : ℤ) := (by simp [binomZ, Ring.choose_natCast]); refine Dvd.dvd.mul_left ?_ _; rw [h1]; exact Int.natCast_dvd_natCast.mpr (thm_prop_binom_p p i hp hmem.1 (by omega))); have h0 : (∑ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (p - 1), binomZ x (n - (i : ℤ)) * binomZ (p : ℤ) (i : ℤ)) ≡ 0 [ZMOD (p : ℤ)] := (Int.modEq_zero_iff_dvd).mpr hS; simpa using ((Int.ModEq.refl (binomZ x n)).add h0).add (Int.ModEq.refl (binomZ x (n - (p : ℤ))))

nodes.label: thm_lem_cong_lem
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_lem_cong_lem : ∀ (A : ℤ → ℤ → ℤ) (N u : ℤ), (∀ a b : ℤ, A a b ≡ A (a - 1) b + A (a - 1) (b - 1) [ZMOD N]) → (A 0 0 ≡ u [ZMOD N]) → (∀ a b : ℤ, b < 0 → A a b ≡ 0 [ZMOD N]) → (∀ b : ℤ, 0 < b → A 0 b ≡ 0 [ZMOD N]) → ∀ a b : ℤ, A a b ≡ u * binomZ a b [ZMOD N] := by
  intro A N u h1 h2 h3 h4; have hb0neg : ∀ b : ℤ, b < 0 → binomZ 0 b = 0 := (fun b hb => by simp only [binomZ, if_neg (show ¬ (0:ℤ) ≤ b by omega)]); have hb00 : binomZ 0 0 = 1 := (by simp [binomZ, Ring.choose_zero_right]); have hb0pos : ∀ b : ℤ, 0 < b → binomZ 0 b = 0 := (fun b hb => by simp only [binomZ, if_pos (show (0:ℤ) ≤ b by omega)]; exact Ring.choose_zero_pos ℤ (show 0 < b.toNat by omega)); have hbneg : ∀ a b : ℤ, b < 0 → binomZ a b = 0 := (fun a b hb => by simp only [binomZ, if_neg (show ¬ (0:ℤ) ≤ b by omega)]); have pascal : ∀ m n : ℤ, binomZ m n = binomZ (m - 1) n + binomZ (m - 1) (n - 1) := (by intro m n; rcases lt_trichotomy n 0 with hn | hn | hn <;> first | (simp only [binomZ, if_neg (show ¬ (0:ℤ) ≤ n by omega), if_neg (show ¬ (0:ℤ) ≤ n - 1 by omega), add_zero]) | (subst hn; simp only [binomZ, if_pos (le_refl (0:ℤ)), if_neg (show ¬ (0:ℤ) ≤ (0:ℤ) - 1 by omega), Int.toNat_zero, Ring.choose_zero_right, add_zero]) | (simp only [binomZ, if_pos (show (0:ℤ) ≤ n by omega), if_pos (show (0:ℤ) ≤ n - 1 by omega), show n.toNat = (n - 1).toNat + 1 by omega]; nth_rewrite 1 [show m = (m - 1) + 1 by ring]; rw [Ring.choose_succ_succ]; ring)); have obs1 : ∀ b : ℤ, A 0 b ≡ u * binomZ 0 b [ZMOD N] := (by intro b; rcases lt_trichotomy b 0 with hb | hb | hb <;> first | (rw [hb0neg b hb, mul_zero]; exact h3 0 b hb) | (subst hb; rw [hb00, mul_one]; exact h2) | (rw [hb0pos b hb, mul_zero]; exact h4 b hb)); have obs2 : ∀ (a : ℕ) (b : ℤ), A (a : ℤ) b ≡ u * binomZ (a : ℤ) b [ZMOD N] := (by intro a; induction a with | zero => (intro b; simpa using obs1 b) | succ c ih => (intro b; push_cast; have hstep := h1 ((c : ℤ) + 1) b; rw [show ((c : ℤ) + 1) - 1 = (c : ℤ) by ring] at hstep; have hp := pascal ((c : ℤ) + 1) b; rw [show ((c : ℤ) + 1) - 1 = (c : ℤ) by ring] at hp; rw [hp, mul_add]; exact hstep.trans ((ih b).add (ih (b - 1))))); have obs3 : ∀ (hh : ℕ) (a b : ℤ), b - a < (hh : ℤ) → A a b ≡ u * binomZ a b [ZMOD N] := (by intro hh; induction hh with | zero => (intro a b hab; by_cases ha : (0:ℤ) ≤ a <;> first | (have h5 := obs2 a.toNat b; rwa [Int.toNat_of_nonneg ha] at h5) | (have hb : b < 0 := (by omega); rw [hbneg a b hb, mul_zero]; exact h3 a b hb)) | succ g ih => (intro a b hab; have hstep := h1 (a + 1) b; rw [show (a + 1) - 1 = a by ring] at hstep; have hp := pascal (a + 1) b; rw [show (a + 1) - 1 = a by ring] at hp; have hIH1 := ih (a + 1) b (by omega); have hIH2 := ih a (b - 1) (by omega); have key : A a b ≡ A (a + 1) b - A a (b - 1) [ZMOD N] := (by simpa using (hstep.symm).sub_right (A a (b - 1))); have goaleq : u * binomZ a b = u * binomZ (a + 1) b - u * binomZ a (b - 1) := (by rw [hp]; ring); rw [goaleq]; exact key.trans (hIH1.sub hIH2))); intro a b; exact obs3 (b - a + 1).toNat a b (by omega)

nodes.label: thm_thm_lucas
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_thm_lucas : ∀ (p : ℕ), p.Prime → ∀ (a b : ℤ) (c d : ℕ), c < p → d < p → binomZ (a * (p : ℤ) + (c : ℤ)) (b * (p : ℤ) + (d : ℤ)) ≡ binomZ a b * binomZ (c : ℤ) (d : ℤ) [ZMOD (p : ℤ)] := by
  intro p hp a b c d hc hd; have hp2 : 2 ≤ p := hp.two_le; have hbneg : ∀ (m n : ℤ), n < 0 → binomZ m n = 0 := (fun m n hn => by simp only [binomZ, if_neg (show ¬ (0:ℤ) ≤ n by omega)]); have hczero : ∀ (n : ℤ), (c:ℤ) < n → binomZ (c:ℤ) n = 0 := (fun n hn => by simp only [binomZ, if_pos (show (0:ℤ) ≤ n by omega)]; rw [Ring.choose_natCast]; exact_mod_cast Nat.choose_eq_zero_of_lt (show c < n.toNat by omega)); have cond1 : ∀ x y : ℤ, binomZ (x * (p:ℤ) + (c:ℤ)) (y * (p:ℤ) + (d:ℤ)) ≡ binomZ ((x - 1) * (p:ℤ) + (c:ℤ)) (y * (p:ℤ) + (d:ℤ)) + binomZ ((x - 1) * (p:ℤ) + (c:ℤ)) ((y - 1) * (p:ℤ) + (d:ℤ)) [ZMOD (p:ℤ)] := (by intro x y; have hv := thm_cor_vandermonde_p ((x - 1) * (p:ℤ) + (c:ℤ)) (y * (p:ℤ) + (d:ℤ)) p hp; rw [show ((x - 1) * (p:ℤ) + (c:ℤ)) + (p:ℤ) = x * (p:ℤ) + (c:ℤ) by ring, show (y * (p:ℤ) + (d:ℤ)) - (p:ℤ) = (y - 1) * (p:ℤ) + (d:ℤ) by ring] at hv; exact hv); have cond2 : binomZ ((0:ℤ) * (p:ℤ) + (c:ℤ)) ((0:ℤ) * (p:ℤ) + (d:ℤ)) ≡ binomZ (c:ℤ) (d:ℤ) [ZMOD (p:ℤ)] := (by rw [show (0:ℤ) * (p:ℤ) + (c:ℤ) = (c:ℤ) by ring, show (0:ℤ) * (p:ℤ) + (d:ℤ) = (d:ℤ) by ring]); have cond3 : ∀ x y : ℤ, y < 0 → binomZ (x * (p:ℤ) + (c:ℤ)) (y * (p:ℤ) + (d:ℤ)) ≡ 0 [ZMOD (p:ℤ)] := (by intro x y hy; have hyd : y * (p:ℤ) + (d:ℤ) < 0 := (by have hdz : (d:ℤ) < (p:ℤ) := (by exact_mod_cast hd); nlinarith [mul_nonneg (show (0:ℤ) ≤ -1 - y by omega) (show (0:ℤ) ≤ (p:ℤ) by positivity)]); rw [hbneg (x * (p:ℤ) + (c:ℤ)) (y * (p:ℤ) + (d:ℤ)) hyd]); have cond4 : ∀ y : ℤ, 0 < y → binomZ ((0:ℤ) * (p:ℤ) + (c:ℤ)) (y * (p:ℤ) + (d:ℤ)) ≡ 0 [ZMOD (p:ℤ)] := (by intro y hy; have hcyd : (c:ℤ) < y * (p:ℤ) + (d:ℤ) := (by have hcz : (c:ℤ) < (p:ℤ) := (by exact_mod_cast hc); nlinarith [mul_nonneg (show (0:ℤ) ≤ y - 1 by omega) (show (0:ℤ) ≤ (p:ℤ) by positivity), Int.natCast_nonneg d]); rw [show (0:ℤ) * (p:ℤ) + (c:ℤ) = (c:ℤ) by ring, hczero (y * (p:ℤ) + (d:ℤ)) hcyd]); have hmain := thm_lem_cong_lem (fun x y => binomZ (x * (p:ℤ) + (c:ℤ)) (y * (p:ℤ) + (d:ℤ))) (p:ℤ) (binomZ (c:ℤ) (d:ℤ)) cond1 cond2 cond3 cond4 a b; rw [mul_comm (binomZ a b) (binomZ (c:ℤ) (d:ℤ))]; exact hmain

nodes.label: thm_lem_lucas1
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_lem_lucas1 : ∀ (p : ℕ), p.Prime → ∀ (r s : ℤ) (k : ℕ), 1 ≤ k → k < p → (p : ℤ) ∣ binomZ (r * (p : ℤ)) (s * (p : ℤ) + (k : ℤ)) := by
  intro p hp r s k hk1 hkp; have hb0k : binomZ (0:ℤ) (k:ℤ) = 0 := (by simp only [binomZ, if_pos (show (0:ℤ) ≤ (k:ℤ) by positivity)]; exact Ring.choose_zero_pos ℤ (show 0 < (k:ℤ).toNat by omega)); have hlucas := thm_thm_lucas p hp r s 0 k (by omega) hkp; simp only [Nat.cast_zero, add_zero] at hlucas; rw [hb0k, mul_zero] at hlucas; exact (Int.modEq_zero_iff_dvd).mp hlucas

nodes.label: thm_cor_vandermonde_p2
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_cor_vandermonde_p2 : ∀ (r b : ℤ) (p : ℕ), p.Prime → binomZ ((r + 1) * (p : ℤ)) (b * (p : ℤ)) ≡ binomZ (r * (p : ℤ)) (b * (p : ℤ)) + binomZ (r * (p : ℤ)) ((b - 1) * (p : ℤ)) [ZMOD (p : ℤ) ^ 2] := by
  intro r b p hp; have hp2 : 2 ≤ p := hp.two_le; have hsum : (p:ℤ)^2 ∣ (∑ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (p - 1), binomZ (r * (p:ℤ)) (b * (p:ℤ) - (i:ℤ)) * binomZ (p:ℤ) (i:ℤ)) := (by apply Finset.dvd_sum; intro i hi; have hmem := Finset.mem_Icc.mp hi; have hd1 : (p:ℤ) ∣ binomZ (p:ℤ) (i:ℤ) := (by have hbc : binomZ (p:ℤ) (i:ℤ) = ((Nat.choose p i : ℕ) : ℤ) := (by simp only [binomZ, if_pos (show (0:ℤ) ≤ (i:ℤ) by positivity)]; rw [show ((i:ℤ)).toNat = i by omega, Ring.choose_natCast]); rw [hbc]; exact_mod_cast thm_prop_binom_p p i hp hmem.1 (by omega)); have hd2 : (p:ℤ) ∣ binomZ (r * (p:ℤ)) (b * (p:ℤ) - (i:ℤ)) := (by have hll := thm_lem_lucas1 p hp r (b - 1) (p - i) (by omega) (by omega); rw [show (b - 1) * (p:ℤ) + (((p - i : ℕ)):ℤ) = b * (p:ℤ) - (i:ℤ) by rw [Nat.cast_sub (show i ≤ p by omega)]; ring] at hll; exact hll); have hprod := mul_dvd_mul hd2 hd1; rwa [← pow_two] at hprod); rw [show (r + 1) * (p:ℤ) = r * (p:ℤ) + (p:ℤ) by ring]; have hv := thm_cor_vandermonde_2 (r * (p:ℤ)) p (b * (p:ℤ)) hp.pos; rw [show (b * (p:ℤ)) - ((p:ℕ):ℤ) = (b - 1) * (p:ℤ) by push_cast; ring] at hv; rw [hv]; have hsummod : (∑ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (p - 1), binomZ (r * (p:ℤ)) (b * (p:ℤ) - (i:ℤ)) * binomZ (p:ℤ) (i:ℤ)) ≡ 0 [ZMOD (p:ℤ)^2] := (Int.modEq_zero_iff_dvd).mpr hsum; have hcomb := ((Int.ModEq.refl (binomZ (r * (p:ℤ)) (b * (p:ℤ)))).add hsummod).add (Int.ModEq.refl (binomZ (r * (p:ℤ)) ((b - 1) * (p:ℤ)))); simpa using hcomb

nodes.label: thm_thm_p2cong
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_thm_p2cong : ∀ (p : ℕ), p.Prime → ∀ (a b : ℤ), binomZ (a * (p : ℤ)) (b * (p : ℤ)) ≡ binomZ a b [ZMOD (p : ℤ) ^ 2] := by
  intro p hp a b; have hp2 : 2 ≤ p := hp.two_le; have hpz : (0:ℤ) < (p:ℤ) := (by exact_mod_cast hp.pos); have hb00 : binomZ (0:ℤ) (0:ℤ) = 1 := (by simp [binomZ, Ring.choose_zero_right]); have hbneg : ∀ (m n : ℤ), n < 0 → binomZ m n = 0 := (fun m n hn => by simp only [binomZ, if_neg (show ¬ (0:ℤ) ≤ n by omega)]); have hb0pos : ∀ (n : ℤ), 0 < n → binomZ (0:ℤ) n = 0 := (fun n hn => by simp only [binomZ, if_pos (show (0:ℤ) ≤ n by omega)]; exact Ring.choose_zero_pos ℤ (show 0 < n.toNat by omega)); have cond1 : ∀ x y : ℤ, binomZ (x * (p:ℤ)) (y * (p:ℤ)) ≡ binomZ ((x - 1) * (p:ℤ)) (y * (p:ℤ)) + binomZ ((x - 1) * (p:ℤ)) ((y - 1) * (p:ℤ)) [ZMOD (p:ℤ)^2] := (by intro x y; have hv := thm_cor_vandermonde_p2 (x - 1) y p hp; rw [show ((x - 1) + 1) * (p:ℤ) = x * (p:ℤ) by ring] at hv; exact hv); have cond2 : binomZ ((0:ℤ) * (p:ℤ)) ((0:ℤ) * (p:ℤ)) ≡ (1:ℤ) [ZMOD (p:ℤ)^2] := (by rw [show (0:ℤ) * (p:ℤ) = (0:ℤ) by ring, hb00]); have cond3 : ∀ x y : ℤ, y < 0 → binomZ (x * (p:ℤ)) (y * (p:ℤ)) ≡ 0 [ZMOD (p:ℤ)^2] := (by intro x y hy; have hyp : y * (p:ℤ) < 0 := (by nlinarith [mul_nonneg (show (0:ℤ) ≤ -1 - y by omega) (show (0:ℤ) ≤ (p:ℤ) by positivity)]); rw [hbneg (x * (p:ℤ)) (y * (p:ℤ)) hyp]); have cond4 : ∀ y : ℤ, 0 < y → binomZ ((0:ℤ) * (p:ℤ)) (y * (p:ℤ)) ≡ 0 [ZMOD (p:ℤ)^2] := (by intro y hy; have hyp : (0:ℤ) < y * (p:ℤ) := (by nlinarith [mul_nonneg (show (0:ℤ) ≤ y - 1 by omega) (show (0:ℤ) ≤ (p:ℤ) by positivity)]); rw [show (0:ℤ) * (p:ℤ) = (0:ℤ) by ring, hb0pos (y * (p:ℤ)) hyp]); have hmain := thm_lem_cong_lem (fun x y => binomZ (x * (p:ℤ)) (y * (p:ℤ))) ((p:ℤ)^2) (1:ℤ) cond1 cond2 cond3 cond4 a b; rw [one_mul] at hmain; exact hmain

nodes.label: thm_lem_powersums_p_small
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_lem_powersums_p_small : ∀ (p : ℕ), p.Prime → ∀ (k : ℕ), k < p - 1 → (∑ l ∈ Finset.range p, (l : ℤ) ^ k) ≡ 0 [ZMOD (p : ℤ)] := by
  intro p hp k hk; haveI : Fact p.Prime := ⟨hp⟩; haveI : NeZero p := ⟨hp.pos.ne'⟩; rw [Int.modEq_zero_iff_dvd, ← ZMod.intCast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd]; push_cast; rw [← FiniteField.sum_pow_lt_card_sub_one (ZMod p) k (by rw [ZMod.card]; exact hk)]; refine Finset.sum_nbij' (fun l : ℕ => (l : ZMod p)) (fun x : ZMod p => x.val) ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_ <;> intro a ha <;> simp_all [Finset.mem_range, ZMod.val_lt, ZMod.natCast_zmod_val, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]

nodes.label: thm_prop_fermat
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_prop_fermat : ∀ (p : ℕ), p.Prime → ∀ (a : ℤ), a ^ p ≡ a [ZMOD (p : ℤ)] := by
  intro p hp a; haveI : Fact p.Prime := ⟨hp⟩; rw [← ZMod.intCast_eq_intCast_iff]; push_cast; exact ZMod.pow_card _

nodes.label: thm_cor_fermat_cong
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_cor_fermat_cong : ∀ (p : ℕ), p.Prime → ∀ (a : ℤ) (k : ℕ), 1 ≤ k → ¬ (p - 1) ∣ k → a ^ k ≡ a ^ (k % (p - 1)) [ZMOD (p : ℤ)] := by
  intro p hp a k hk hkd; haveI : Fact p.Prime := ⟨hp⟩; rw [← ZMod.intCast_eq_intCast_iff]; push_cast; have hr : k % (p-1) ≠ 0 := fun h => hkd (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero h); nth_rewrite 1 [← Nat.div_add_mod k (p-1)]; rw [pow_add, pow_mul]; rcases eq_or_ne ((a : ZMod p)) 0 with hx | hx <;> first | rw [hx, zero_pow hr, mul_zero] | rw [ZMod.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one hx, one_pow, one_mul]

nodes.label: thm_thm_powersums_p
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_thm_powersums_p : ∀ (p : ℕ), p.Prime → ∀ (k : ℕ), ¬ (0 < k ∧ (p - 1) ∣ k) → (∑ l ∈ Finset.range p, (l : ℤ) ^ k) ≡ 0 [ZMOD (p : ℤ)] := by
  intro p hp k hk; by_cases hklt : k < p - 1 <;> first | (exact thm_lem_powersums_p_small p hp k hklt) | (push_neg at hklt; have hp2 : 2 ≤ p := hp.two_le; have hpos : 0 < k := (by omega); have hnd : ¬ (p - 1) ∣ k := fun hd => hk ⟨hpos, hd⟩; have hrlt : k % (p - 1) < p - 1 := Nat.mod_lt k (by omega); have hcong : (∑ l ∈ Finset.range p, (l : ℤ) ^ k) ≡ (∑ l ∈ Finset.range p, (l : ℤ) ^ (k % (p - 1))) [ZMOD (p : ℤ)] := Int.ModEq.sum (fun l _ => thm_cor_fermat_cong p hp (l : ℤ) k hpos hnd); exact hcong.trans (thm_lem_powersums_p_small p hp (k % (p - 1)) hrlt))
